data.description: More than 60 world leaders and 3,000 delegates from 130 countries will make their way to a Swiss ski resort this week, to mingle with 850 CEOs and business titans. But there are a few notable exceptions – and that absentee list is growing. CGTN’s Aden-Jay Wood reports from

data.title: FRC's Tony Perkins to attend Fifth Circuit oral arguments in Louisiana Ten Commandments case on Jan. 20.
data.description: Tomorrow, January 20, 2026, Tony Perkins, the President of the Family Research Council (FRC) and a former Louisiana Legislature member, will be present for an oral argument at the U.S. Court of Appeals for the Fifth Circuit in the case of Roake v. Brumley. This hearing is part of the en banc review process.

data.title: Steak ‘n Shake increases Bitcoin exposure to $10 million, after crediting crypto for sales boost.
data.description: Steak ‘n Shake, a popular restaurant chain, is increasing its focus on Bitcoin after attributing the cryptocurrency to boosting sales in the past year. The company has decided to put more emphasis on Bitcoin due to its impact on driving a significant increase in revenue.

World leaders from government, business, civil society and academia are convening in Davos to discuss global issues at a time of great turbulence. The Annual Meeting 2026 of the World Economic Forum lasts until January 23. Among the attendees are the largest US delegation ever to

data.title: Dow futures drop as Trump threatens tariffs on 8 NATO nations over Greenland - US markets closed for MLK Jr. day.
data.description: Futures in the market experienced a decline after President Trump mentioned that eight European NATO nations could face tariffs unless the U.S. acquires Greenland. The U.S. markets will be closed on Monday in observance of the MLK Jr. holiday. The push for Greenland is linked to Trump's dissatisfaction over not receiving a Nobel Prize. Dow Jones Futures recorded a fall as a result of these developments.

data.title: UpdatePromise and Dealer Tire have partnered to enhance tire sales experience for dealerships, aiming to boost revenue and profits. This collaboration integrates real-time tire data, OEM incentives, and live inventory visibility into service workflow for an improved customer experience.
data.description: Tire sales pose a significant potential for boosting revenue and profits within dealership fixed operations. A partnership between UpdatePromise and Dealer Tire aims to leverage this opportunity by integrating real-time tire data, original equipment manufacturer (OEM) incentives, and live inventory updates into the service workflow. This collaboration is expected to enhance efficiency and maximize sales within the dealership.

data.title: Suzanne Dana recognized as Pinnacle Professional Member in The Inner Circle for contributions to Williamsburg Real Estate.
data.description: In Williamsburg, Virginia on January 19, 2026, Suzanne Dana was acknowledged as a distinguished member of The Inner Circle, earning the title of Pinnacle Professional Member Inner Circle of Excellence for her significant impact on Residential Real Estate in the Williamsburg and Tidewater Area. Dana, with over two decades of experience, stands out for her exceptional contributions.

data.title: Dale Armour recognized as 2026 Pinnacle Professional Member of Inner Circle of Excellence for Law Enforcement by The Inner Circle.
data.description: In Nolensville, Tennessee on January 19, 2026, Dale Armour was recognized in The Inner Circle as a distinguished member, being awarded the 2026 Pinnacle Professional Member Inner Circle of Excellence for his outstanding work in Law Enforcement. With a career of over 40 years, he has made notable contributions to the field.

data.title: Dr. Andrij O Baran named Pinnacle Lifetime Member by The Inner Circle for 40+ years of service as a distinguished Cardiologist.
data.description: In Saratoga Springs, N.Y., on January 19, 2026, Andrij O Baran, MD, FACC was recognized in The Inner Circle as a Pinnacle Lifetime Member for his outstanding achievements. Dr. Baran, a distinguished cardiologist and community leader, has been commended for over 40 years of clinical excellence.

data.title: American duo Brock Heger and Max Eddy Jr. win back-to-back titles at 2026 Dakar Rally, Polaris claims third consecutive SSV victory with race-ready RZR Pro R Rally; Press Release: Minneapolis, Jan. 19, 2026.
data.description: In a bid to retain their Dakar title, LOEB FrayMédia Motorsport's RZR Factory Racing team will be utilizing the newly-designed Polaris RZR Pro R Rally that complies with the latest FIA regulations. The vehicle boasts superior power, durability, and precise handling. The team, based in MINNEAPOLIS, is gearing up for the challenge as they prepare to conquer the demanding course stretching approximately 5,000 kilometers.

data.title: Misurata Free Zone signs $2.7B PPP to upgrade port, aiming to become a top Mediterranean Gateway.
data.description: In a significant development on January 19, 2026, in Misurata, Libya, the Misurata Free Zone (MFZ) has entered into a transformative public-private partnership deal. This venture aims to revamp and oversee the operations, advancement, and enlargement of the Misurata Free Zone Port. As Libya's primary container terminal and the busiest maritime center for commercial activities in the nation, this agreement is poised to enhance the port's capabilities significantly.

data.title: Itaú Unibanco to present 4Q25 results on Feb 5, 2026, at 8am EST and 10am Brasília time. Meeting in Portuguese and English with Q&A session. Register to participate.
data.description: In São Paulo on January 19, 2026, an upcoming event is set to take place on February 5, 2026. Scheduled for 8 a.m. EST and 10 a.m. Brasília time, the event will showcase the 4th quarter results of 2025 in both Portuguese and English languages. This interactive session includes a Q&A segment at the conclusion. Participants can join by registering for the event.
